meta.injection_rule: inject only within defined 64-hex emotional topology; no hardcoded outside table truth; binary/trigam/index fields are immutable

64.pattern_shape: Before Completion: 010101 | stability=0.50 change=0.50 alignment=0.42 dominant=voiceWeight=0.60 porosity=0.75 | fire over water, before completion
64.ternary_injection_notes: use voiceWeight=0.60 as primary selector; bleed via porosity=0.75; keep within defined 64 hex emotional topology

rsmv_verified_constructs.math: headmodels are duplicated into adjacent slots; gender pairs are consecutive indices
interactionFlagCount = has_vertices + has_indices + has_normals + has_uvs + submeshes_N + base_model + high_poly
SELECT DATA,CRC FROM cache WHERE KEY=?; SELECT DATA FROM cache_index; decompress header bytes 0/1/2/3/0x5a
level0..level3 arrays of 4356 tiles; flags 1/2/4/8/16/32/64; height conditional on buildnr>=936
mapzone bounds: plane + src/dst x/z rectangles
year→month→day→update taxonomy; cache VERSION timestamps map to named update instances

source: Jagex .jcache VERSION timestamps + RuneScape Wiki Game_updates 2025-2026

summary.confirmed: Jagex cache.VERSION = Unix timestamp of cache write; correlates with game update deployments within 0-3 days

metadata.cache_schema: cache(KEY, DATA, VERSION, CRC) - no minor column
